title: Mud and Dirt Armadillos
description: We all know that the crab was supposed to win the mob vote in 2023! With this resource pack, you can take revenge on the armadillo!
body:
We all know that the crab was supposed to win the mob vote in 2023! With this resource pack, you can take revenge on the armadillo!
### For variations to work, you need to use OptiFine or the ETF mod.

This resource pack adds armadillo variations:
- Dirty
- Mud
- Dirt
- Coarse Dirt
- Rooted Dirt
- Muddy mangrove roots
- Podzol
- Mycelium
- Grass

And changing textures:
- Baby armadillo
- Wolf armor
- Armadillo scute
- Armadillo spawn egg
